summary: The Docker-based reproduction confirms that Django's QuerySet.extra(order_by=...) fails to quote the column-name portion of dotted strings, allowing order-based blind SQL injection in the ORDER BY clause. The exploit uses id * CASE WHEN condition THEN 1 ELSE -1 END to reverse the product ordering when the injected condition is false, extracting a secret value from a protected database table character by character.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction should demonstrate that an attacker-controlled order_by parameter changes the ordering of query results based on the content of a secret database value, confirming full blind SQL injection data exfiltration through the ORDER BY clause.
actual_observed_result: The exploit sends crafted sort parameters containing SQL CASE expressions in the ORDER BY clause. When the injected condition matches the secret, products appear in ascending order (alpha, beta, delta); when it does not match, products appear in descending order (delta, beta, alpha). The exploit extracts the complete secret value character by character.
verification_method: The exploit performs four verification stages: (1) baseline true-condition produces ascending order, (2) anti-baseline false-condition produces descending order, (3) exact known secret value produces ascending order while a wrong value produces descending order, (4) full character-by-character extraction matches the known secret. The test fails if any stage produces the wrong ordering.
evidence_produced_by_run: Baseline SQL injection test: true-condition payload (1=1) produces ascending order [alpha, beta, delta]; false-condition payload (1=2) produces descending order [delta, beta, alpha].
Direct secret verification: correct value 'EVOHUNT_SECRET_2026' produces ascending order; wrong value produces descending order.
Full blind extraction: secret length detected via length() comparison (18 chars), then each character extracted via substr() comparison.
Extracted value matches the planted secret exactly, confirming complete data exfiltration through the ORDER BY injection.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit, and mounts that checkout into the container at /target-repo.
